feed.title: tallywyteee
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from tallywyteee

entry.title: Why would homie use such colorful language to describe me? 💀😅👀
entry.content: Why would homie use such colorful language to describe me? 💀😅👀

entry.title: Do you think he lowkey wants me? 😂👀💙
entry.content: Do you think he lowkey wants me? 😂👀💙

entry.title: Why would homie scream “not again!?” 😂👀💙
entry.content: Why would homie scream “not again!?” 😂👀💙

entry.title: You think Kermit lowkey cooked here? 🐸👀🥒🌟
entry.content: You think Kermit lowkey cooked here? 🐸👀🥒🌟

entry.title: So did homie want me to get sturdy or not? 😂💙
entry.content: So did homie want me to get sturdy or not? 😂💙

entry.title: Be careful homie, I might getcho girl’s number too… 😂👀💙 (but you’re number one, don’t forget that)
entry.content: Be careful homie, I might getcho girl’s number too… 😂👀💙 (but you’re number one, don’t forget that)

entry.title: Is this as real as it gets for a trans girl? 😂🏳️‍⚧️
entry.content: Is this as real as it gets for a trans girl? 😂🏳️‍⚧️

entry.title: Did you expect her to say that?? 😱
entry.content: Did you expect her to say that?? 😱

entry.title: I was just born with a deep voice… 😂
entry.content: I was just born with a deep voice… 😂

entry.title: I never thought a homie living in the closet would say such kind words to me 😇🙏🏻
entry.content: I never thought a homie living in the closet would say such kind words to me 😇🙏🏻

entry.title: I can’t believe homie said I look like a fairy 😂🧚🏼‍♀️
entry.content: I can’t believe homie said I look like a fairy 😂🧚🏼‍♀️

entry.title: Homie wanted me to be his habibi… 👀💙
entry.content: Homie wanted me to be his habibi… 👀💙

entry.title: But only for real ones. And donuts. And chocolate. Okay, i smile for a lot of things but not very often. Sometimes. Maybe… 😅
entry.content: But only for real ones. And donuts. And chocolate. Okay, i smile for a lot of things but not very often. Sometimes. Maybe… 😅

entry.title: Homie just found out about pronouns 😂👍🏻
entry.content: Homie just found out about pronouns 😂👍🏻

entry.title: Do you think I look like Link, are are these puppet homies tripping? 😂👀🧝🏻‍♀️
entry.content: Do you think I look like Link, are are these puppet homies tripping? 😂👀🧝🏻‍♀️

entry.title: Why would homie say such cruel words 😂💔
entry.content: Why would homie say such cruel words 😂💔

entry.title: Life is complicated, and weird, and all sorts of things. Sometimes I’m like wtf and others times I’m like heck yeah this is awesome 😄
entry.content: Life is complicated, and weird, and all sorts of things. Sometimes I’m like wtf and others times I’m like heck yeah this is awesome 😄

entry.title: I’m starting to think maybe I should’ve skipped homie… 😂
entry.content: I’m starting to think maybe I should’ve skipped homie… 😂

entry.title: Honestly, I love traveling to new places. There’s always all sorts of new things to learn and people to meet. New experiences while traveling are so much fun, and so freaking memorable 😄✈️🧭
entry.content: Honestly, I love traveling to new places. There’s always all sorts of new things to learn and people to meet. New experiences while traveling are so much fun, and so freaking memorable 😄✈️🧭

entry.title: Why would homie say that about my mother? 😅
entry.content: Why would homie say that about my mother? 😅

entry.title: What do you think homie was feeling for me? 😌👀💙
entry.content: What do you think homie was feeling for me? 😌👀💙

entry.title: I can’t believe I rizzed three people at once… 👀❤️
entry.content: I can’t believe I rizzed three people at once… 👀❤️

entry.title: I think the one thing i still struggle with is saying sorry less. I don’t know why, but i feel the need to apologize all the time for stuff i don’t need to. Sorry about ranting, hopefully you get where i’m coming from 😂👍🏻
entry.content: I think the one thing i still struggle with is saying sorry less. I don’t know why, but i feel the need to apologize all the time for stuff i don’t need to. Sorry about ranting, hopefully you get where i’m coming from 😂👍🏻

entry.title: I’m not afraid to admit that I love and hate a lot of people. But, what is scary to admit is that the people I hate most are the people I once loved the most. The memories that I at one point held close in my heart are now a sad reflection of the present
entry.content: I’m not afraid to admit that I love and hate a lot of people. But, what is scary to admit is that the people I hate most are the people I once loved the most. The memories that I at one point held close in my heart are now a sad reflection of the present

entry.title: Would you wanna be my friend just like him? 😇❤️
entry.content: Would you wanna be my friend just like him? 😇❤️

entry.title: The best part about being friends with me is that I’m loyal. You treat me right, I treat you right. So if we’re pulling up to get ice cream and you don’t get me any, it’s over… 😂👍🏻
entry.content: The best part about being friends with me is that I’m loyal. You treat me right, I treat you right. So if we’re pulling up to get ice cream and you don’t get me any, it’s over… 😂👍🏻

entry.title: Homie and i got a little sturdy… 😎👀💙
entry.content: Homie and i got a little sturdy… 😎👀💙

entry.title: This year I explored and listened to a lot of new music. Discovering artists like Young Miko and Villano Antillano have been lowkey lifechanging. I’ve never seen or listened to such icons until now. I’m not afraid to say that I’ve been considering my iden
entry.content: This year I explored and listened to a lot of new music. Discovering artists like Young Miko and Villano Antillano have been lowkey lifechanging. I’ve never seen or listened to such icons until now. I’m not afraid to say that I’ve been considering my iden

entry.title: She stunlocked me with the “boy” combo 😭
entry.content: She stunlocked me with the “boy” combo 😭

entry.title: I taught homie the truth about trans girls…with scoence 😏🧬
entry.content: I taught homie the truth about trans girls…with scoence 😏🧬

entry.title: Would you watch NASCAR with me? 😁❤️ (and a few other things too)
entry.content: Would you watch NASCAR with me? 😁❤️ (and a few other things too)

entry.title: Why is it so easy to look… like a girl? 😱
entry.content: Why is it so easy to look… like a girl? 😱

entry.title: I don’t think anyone has ever asked me this question before… 😂
entry.content: I don’t think anyone has ever asked me this question before… 😂

entry.title: What is homie talking about? 😂
entry.content: What is homie talking about? 😂

entry.title: How would you have reacted? 💀
entry.content: How would you have reacted? 💀
